Composition.Programmer 1: Fix and enhance main.py to ensure all routes correctly load and process data from local text files as per the requirements. Specifically, fix the dashboard() function to handle the absence of the 'dashboard.html' template by coordinating with Programmer 2 to ensure the template is created with all required elements and IDs. Maintain and improve data loading functions and route handlers for all pages to align with the requirements document.
Composition.Programmer 2: Implement the complete set of HTML template files for the TravelPlanner web application, starting with creating 'dashboard.html' to resolve the TemplateNotFound error. Each template must strictly follow the page design specifications in the requirements document, including all specified elements with correct IDs, page titles, and layout. Templates should be created for all ten pages  Dashboard, Destinations, Destination Details, Itinerary Planning, Accommodations, Transportation, Travel Packages, Trip Management, Booking Confirmation, and Travel Recommendations. Coordinate with Programmer 1 to ensure templates match the data and variables passed from Flask routes.

Composition.Programmer 1:
Test whether the website can be accessed through local port 5000. In this test, you only need to test whether the first page of the website can be accessed through the local 5000 port.
Task 2  Test whether the first page of the website loads correctly and whether basic navigation works based on the example data provided in the Task.
